name: python3-smart-open
title: python3-smart-open
description:
utils for streaming large files
smart-open is a library for efficient streaming of very large files
from/to storages such as HDFS, WebHDFS, HTTP, HTTPS, SFTP, or local
filesystem. It supports transparent, on-the-fly (de-)compression for a
variety of different formats (gzip, bz2, etc.).
.
This package excludes the support of S3 and GCS.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-smart-open because utils for streaming large files.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-smart-open as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-smart-open with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-smart-open --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
